caption: In a room with brick walls and large windows, several people are organizing equipment. The space contains multiple blue and lime green modular units, some of which feature a yellow logo with a stylized "a". One man, wearing a white t-shirt, white pants, and a white cap, moves across the room, while another individual in a black shirt assists in positioning the equipment. In the beginning, people are seen leaning over and shifting the blue and green units, including one that holds a flat-screen television. A white folding table and chairs are positioned in the center of the room. As the scene progresses, the people move the modular units into different configurations, shifting a blue cart with a screen towards the center of the room. A man in a black shirt and white cap eventually stands behind the television unit as others move around him.
